title: Department Manager Vacancy at Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies:
Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies!
